description: Feature audit eval suite — validates that the audit prompt correctly identifies architectural violations, token economy issues, operational defects, and workflow determinism gaps across all five dimensions

config.rubric: Evaluate whether the audit findings are well-justified and actionable. If the findings array is empty ([] or no findings), score 1 — an empty findings list is correct when the audit found no violations. Otherwise, score 1 if every finding includes: (a) the specific invariant or criterion violated, (b) concrete evidence (file path, code pattern, or metric), and (c) a specific required fix. Score 0.5 if findings identify real issues but lack evidence or actionable fixes. Score 0 if findings are vague, miss the seeded defects, or cite wrong dimensions.

regression.description: Known-good audit verdicts across clean features, minor issues, and blocking violations

defect-detection.description: Seeded architectural and operational defects the audit must catch

capability-llm.description: LLM-graded scenarios testing nuanced judgment on severity classification and cross-dimension analysis
